title: Legal RAG Hallucinations
wikilinks: Hallucinations in Legal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Systems
Typology of Legal Hallucinations: Correctness and Groundedness
summary: This article presents the first preregistered empirical evaluation of leading AI legal research tools, focusing on their reliability and the prevalence of hallucinations. It systematically assesses RAG-based proprietary legal AI tools, i...
